programs.title: American Pickers
programs.desc: The guys reckon petroliana is plentiful in the Lone Star State, but tracking down a Texas-sized honey hole proves much trickier than expected.

programs.title: Pawn Stars
programs.sub_title: Best Of - Don't Judge A Pawn By Its
programs.desc: Will an 1842 Book of Mormon make Rick a believer? Will he wait for winter to come for a limited edition signed Game of Thrones, or be sucked in by P.T. Barnum's tell-all tale?

programs.title: Aussie Salvage Squad
programs.desc: At a marine sanctuary in the far Northern Territory, Team Salvage must overcome a mechanical catastrophe to recover a beached 7-ton Catamaran.

programs.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programs.desc: The Poseidon Crew hunt a remote mountain pass, a gold drought puts huge pressure on Jacqui and Andrew, Levi and Bridget are left to hunt alone, and the Ferals hunt in the extreme Pilbara region.

programs.title: Kings Of Pain
programs.desc: It's America vs. Australia in a battle royale of pain administered by sharks. But after getting stung by both, Adam and Rob realise that when their countries win, they lose.

programs.title: Mark Berg's Fishing Addiction
programs.desc: Fishing expert Mark Berg visits some of the best fishing destinations around. Chasing a wide variety of fish, Mark is always hoping to capture a new species or develop a new technique.
